name: Max Resource Corp.
description: Max Resource Corp. is a copper-silver exploration company focused on the district-scale CESAR Copper-Silver Project in northeastern Colombia, situated along the Andean copper belt with over 120 km of prospective strike length. The company has made multiple high-grade copper-silver discoveries including the CONEJO zone averaging 4.9% copper over 3.7 km, and also holds the RT Gold project in Peru.
